《科大學生校董選舉重選結果》
{HKUST Election for Council Student Representative Voting Result}

科大學生校董選舉重選點票完結，重選總票數為8360，去屆學生會幹事符佩瑩以5237票再次擊敗第四次參選之內地學生學者聯誼會副主席勞普生，成功當選科大校董會學生代表，本會在此恭賀侯任校董符佩瑩。

HKUST Election for Council Student Representative vote counting has ended, total number of votes is 8360. Candidate No. 2 FU Pui Ying is declared elected with 5237 votes. The Students’ Union extends its hearty congratulations on her victory.

科大學生會
HKUSTSU
2020-4-19
